context: Evaluate safe generator implementation with Tree API and boundary validation

checklist.name: Tree API usage
checklist.description: Generator uses tree.write(), generateFiles(), or updateJson() exclusively for filesystem operations. No fs.writeFileSync or direct filesystem writes.

checklist.name: Schema validation
checklist.description: Schema includes typed interface (schema.d.ts), required fields marked in schema.json, and validation guards in generator code.

checklist.name: Read before mutate
checklist.description: Generator calls readProjectConfiguration() before updateProjectConfiguration() and preserves existing targets/tags.

checklist.name: Boundary enforcement
checklist.description: Generator validates project tags/boundaries before cross-scope imports and throws errors for violations.

checklist.name: Format after generation
checklist.description: Generator calls formatFiles(tree) after generateFiles() or file writes.

checklist.name: Existence check
checklist.description: Generator checks tree.exists() before overwriting files and handles conflicts gracefully.

checklist.name: No hardcoded paths
checklist.description: Generator derives paths from readProjectConfiguration().root instead of hardcoding libs/ or apps/ paths.
